title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 13, 2025
summary: February 13, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has has changed to increasing for this week at a rate of 2.05% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of -0.45%), from the level on 02/06/2025 of 13.393 M km 2 to 13.673 M km 2 for this week. So, after two anomalous weeks in a row of decreasing sea ice extent,...
